messages.content: Create a nutritious, high-protein recipe using chicken, broccoli, and sweet potatoes

message.content:
# High-Protein Chicken, Broccoli & Sweet Potato Power Bowl

## Macros per serving (serves 2):
- **Protein:** 52g
- **Carbs:** 42g
- **Fat:** 14g
- **Calories:** ~520

---

## Ingredients

| Component | Amount |
|-----------|--------|
| Chicken breast | 12 oz (340g) |
| Sweet potatoes | 2 medium (400g) |
| Broccoli florets | 3 cups (270g) |
| Olive oil | 2 tbsp |
| Garlic | 4 cloves |
| Smoked paprika | 1 tsp |
| Cumin | ½ tsp |
| Salt & pepper | To taste |
| Lemon juice | 1 tbsp |
| Optional: feta or tahini | 2 tbsp |

---

## Instructions

### 1. Roast the Sweet Potatoes
- Preheat oven to **425°F (220°C)**
- Cube sweet potatoes into ½" pieces
- Toss with 1 tbsp oil, paprika, salt, pepper
- Roast **25–30 min** until caramelized

### 2. Cook the Chicken
- Pound chicken to even thickness
- Season with cumin, salt, pepper
- Sear in skillet **6–7 min per side**
- Rest 5 min, then slice

### 3. Sauté the Broccoli
- Steam or sauté with remaining oil and garlic **5–6 min**
- Keep bright green with slight crunch
- Finish with lemon juice

### 4. Assemble
Layer: sweet potatoes → broccoli → sliced chicken
Drizzle with tahini or crumble feta if desired

---

## Pro Tips
- **Meal prep:** Stores 4 days refrigerated
- **Boost protein:** Add hemp seeds (+10g protein)
- **Faster option:** Use pre-cooked rotisserie chicken

Want a one-pan sheet version or different flavor profile (Asian, Mediterranean, etc.)?
